title: Gut Health Drink
instructions: Boil four cups of water. Add peppermint leaves, fennel seeds, and cumin seeds. Let it simmer for ten minutes. Strain the liquid, add lemon juice and honey if desired, and drink once or twice a day after meals.
benefits: Helps alleviate common digestive discomforts such as bloating, gas, and cramps.

title: Dandruff (Neem and Curd)
instructions: Wash hair with water boiled with neem leaves. Mix neem leaves with curd and apply to the scalp. Leave for 15–20 minutes and wash with warm water.
benefits: Neem helps control dandruff-causing fungus while curd moisturizes the scalp.

title: Dandruff (Fenugreek and Curd)
instructions: Soak fenugreek seeds overnight and grind into a paste. Mix with curd and one teaspoon of triphala churna. Apply to the scalp, leave for one hour, and wash with mild shampoo.
benefits: Fenugreek provides antifungal and moisturizing properties that help reduce dandruff.

title: Dandruff (Coconut Oil and Lemon)
instructions: Warm two tablespoons of coconut oil and mix with one tablespoon of lemon juice. Apply to the scalp in the evening and leave overnight. Use once a week.
benefits: Coconut oil moisturizes the scalp while lemon helps reduce dandruff-causing microbes.

title: Acid Reflux Relief
instructions: Soak coriander seeds in water overnight and consume the water the next day. Include barley water and cucumber in the diet as supportive measures.
benefits: Soothes the stomach lining and supports digestion while reducing acidity and bloating.

title: Kadha
instructions: Boil grated ginger, crushed tulsi leaves, cinnamon powder, and black pepper powder in half a cup of water. Strain and drink warm.
benefits: Helps relieve throat discomfort, congestion, and supports immunity.

title: Cough and Cold (Herbal Decoction)
instructions: Boil all ingredients for ten minutes. Strain and drink warm. Add jaggery if the taste is too strong. Drink twice daily.
benefits: Helps clear mucus, reduce congestion, and support respiratory comfort.

title: Cough and Cold (Honey and Ginger)
instructions: Take one spoon of honey, add a few drops of ginger juice and a pinch of turmeric. Mix well and consume twice a day.
benefits: Soothes the throat and supports the body during cold and cough.

title: Cough and Cold (Herbal Ladoo)
instructions: Make a paste of jaggery, add ginger and turmeric powder, roll into small ladoos, and consume twice a day.
benefits: Provides warming comfort, soothes the throat, and supports natural defenses.

title: Skin Allergy Relief
instructions: Mix turmeric, black pepper, ghee, and coriander powder. Consume two to three times a day.
benefits: Helps reduce skin inflammation and itching while supporting skin healing.

title: Activated Charcoal Face Pack
instructions: Mix one teaspoon activated charcoal powder with one teaspoon aloe vera gel and one drop of tea tree oil. Apply gently on the face and rinse after 15 minutes.
benefits: Draws out impurities, controls excess oil, and helps prevent breakouts.

title: Rice Flour Face Pack
instructions: Mix rice flour, honey, and lemon juice. Apply on face and neck and rinse after 15 minutes.
benefits: Absorbs excess oil, removes dead skin cells, and helps reduce pimples.

title: Facial Hair Removal (Gram Flour Pack)
instructions: Mix all ingredients into a paste and apply evenly. Leave for 15–20 minutes, then wash and pat dry.
benefits: Helps reduce facial hair growth gradually while brightening skin.

title: Sugaring
instructions: Mix lemon juice, sugar, and water to form a thick paste. Rub gently on the face.
benefits: Helps remove hair gently from the roots.

title: Facial Hair Removal (Honey and Lemon)
instructions: Mix honey and lemon juice, apply for 20 minutes, then wipe off with a warm damp cloth.
benefits: Helps weaken facial hair over time while moisturizing the skin.

title: Ant Repellent
instructions: Sprinkle cinnamon powder or place cinnamon sticks where ants enter.
benefits: Keeps ants away naturally without chemicals.

title: Unclog Drains
instructions: Pour baking soda followed by vinegar into the drain. Let sit for 10–15 minutes, then flush with hot water.
benefits: Clears drains and removes odor safely.

title: Newspaper for Shiny Glass
instructions: Spray vinegar on glass and wipe with crumpled newspaper.
benefits: Makes glass shiny without streaks.

title: Banana Peel Shoe Polish
instructions: Rub the inner side of banana peel on shoes and wipe with a cloth.
benefits: Adds natural shine without polish.

title: Salt for Fresh Stains
instructions: Sprinkle salt on fresh stains, let it absorb, then wash.
benefits: Prevents stain spreading by absorbing liquid.

title: Constipation During Pregnancy
instructions: Drink adequate water, include flax seeds or flax seed oil, consume buttermilk or probiotics, and practice gentle prenatal yoga.
benefits: Supports digestion and helps maintain regular bowel movement.

title: Pain and Swelling Relief
instructions: Elevate feet above heart level and soak feet in warm water with epsom salt.
benefits: Helps improve circulation and reduce discomfort.

title: Heartburn Relief
instructions: Eat smaller meals and drink cold milk or chew fennel seeds.
benefits: Helps soothe the stomach and reduce acidity.

title: Stress and Body Pain Relief
instructions: Practice gentle prenatal stretching, walking, and deep breathing exercises.
benefits: Helps reduce stress and improve mood.

title: Better Sleep and Calm
instructions: Drink warm milk before bed and sleep on the left side with a pillow between the legs.
benefits: Supports better sleep and reduces back discomfort.

title: Morning Sickness Relief
instructions: Sip warm ginger water or chew a small piece of ginger and eat small meals frequently.
benefits: Helps reduce nausea naturally.

title: Vomiting During Pregnancy
instructions: Drink ginger tea, inhale the scent of fresh lemon, and sip peppermint tea.
benefits: Helps calm the stomach and reduce nausea.
